response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's resume lacks clear evidence of meeting the core requirements for this embedded networking security role. While he demonstrates strong expertise in full-stack development, web/mobile applications, and AI infrastructure in modern languages like TypeScript and D, there is no indication of experience with C programming for UNIX/embedded systems, Linux kernel modification, or networking security technologies. His background in high-level software and web platforms does not align with the embedded firmware and LAN-switch product focus required.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and frameworks
Proven ability to build and maintain complex software systems and platforms
Active open-source contributor with demonstrated technical leadership
concerns: No experience with C programming in embedded/UNIX environments
No evidence of Linux kernel investigation or source-code modification
Lacks networking security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.) and embedded system experience
No native-level Japanese language proficiency as required
